steps.title: Focus on the requested difference
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a difference between Ephydra cinerea and Nodularia. The notes show that one is an aquatic insect and the other is a bacterium.

steps.title: Reject shared or irrelevant details
steps.content: B discusses salt concentration rather than either organism. C emphasizes that both live in the same part of the lake, and D describes only Ephydra cinerea. The answer is A.
